summary: Verified 113-resource seed expansion for Haven civic platform. Backend GET /api/resources returns exactly 113 unique resources (no duplicates) including the new entries. Frontend Find Resources page renders 113 of 113 resource-cards and contains all newly required entries. Live Resource Map widget on the resident dashboard displays '125 nearby resources' because ResourceMapWidget.jsx intentionally merges CAMPING_AS_MAP_RESOURCES (12 camping locations) with the 113 API resources -- this is by-design, not a regression from the seed expansion.
action_items: OPTIONAL / verify with product: The Live Resource Map widget shows '125 nearby resources' rather than the '113' called out in the ticket. Reason: ResourceMapWidget.jsx (import on line 6, merge in useEffect at line 78-80) intentionally surfaces the 12 CAMPING_AS_MAP_RESOURCES on top of the API resources -> 113 + 12 = 125. If the ticket owner truly wants the widget to read '113', remove the camping merge or count only API entries; otherwise this is expected and the seed fix (63 -> 113) is working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: ResourceMapWidget widget count is derived from a client-side merge (API + hardcoded camping). This means the displayed number will drift from GET /api/resources whenever the camping list changes. Consider moving camping into the DB / seed so a single source of truth backs the count.
seed.py upserts by name -> safe idempotent behavior verified (113 unique names confirmed via API).
test_credentials: resident@haven.demo / Demo2026! (one-click 'Resident' demo button also works)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend /api/resources = 113 unique. Find Resources page (/resources) shows '113 OF 113 RESOURCES' + 113 [data-testid*='resource-card'] items and includes Next Door Solutions to Domestic Violence, Martha's Kitchen, 988 Suicide & Crisis Lifeline. Dashboard map widget shows 125 because it merges 12 hardcoded camping entries from src/data/camping.js (CAMPING_AS_MAP_RESOURCES) with the API list -- this is intentional. Do not test BB chat or AI doc scanner (LLM credit cost). Login page has SKIP INTRO splash; one-click 'Resident' demo button on the sign-in card also logs in as resident@haven.demo.
rca of the issue: N/A -- the reported 63/75 -> 113 count issue is resolved on the backend. The dashboard displaying 125 vs 113 is expected behavior from client-side camping merge, not a defect.
